arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur vs Manchester United – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur face Manchester United this evening with European silverware on the line. The two teams meet in an all-English Europa League final, in a last opportunity to salvage challenging campaigns. Spurs are aiming to end a 17-year wait for a major trophy, while victory will also assure a place in next season’s Champions League. arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Manchester United – Europa League final preview
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester United battle it out tonight in an all-English Europa League final. Alongside the prospect of lifting the coveted trophy, both teams have an extra incentive this evening. The winner automatically qualifies for the Champions League next season, something that isn’t attainable through their league positions. arts.ttl: “We both deserve to win” – Tottenham star credits Manchester United for European run
arts.sum: Tottenham take on Manchester United in the Europa League final today and it’s a huge day in the club’s history. Spurs don’t just get a chance to win their first piece of silverware in 17 years, but it can also be their first European trophy since 1972.
